backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Testimonial type and Map-based storage with functions to add, retrieve by ID, and get all testimonials.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features for eagle logo animations, energy spread effects, container animations, service button scroll linking, and related components with test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components describing their functionality, animations, styling, and integration points across the application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors, borders, and design tokens for the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tags, root div for React mounting, and external Jotform embed script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component managing intro animation state, rendering all sections with GPU-accelerated scroll-triggered animations using useSectionAnimation hook with staggered delays.
frontend/src/components/AboutUsSection.t: About section with two-column layout featuring AI illustration with glow effects, glassmorphism content card with company description, feature highlights with check icons, and CTA buttons for consultation and services.
frontend/src/components/AIPerformanceSec: Performance metrics section displaying four animated metric cards with counter animations, a testimonial quote, and a connected workflow visualization image with pulsing node overlays.
frontend/src/components/animations/ChatB: Animated chat interface showing sequential message bubbles with typing indicators, simulating a chatbot conversation that loops continuously.
frontend/src/components/animations/Email: Pipeline visualization showing email workflow stages (Draft, Send, Deliver, Open) with animated progress line and flowing email icons.
frontend/src/components/animations/Mobil: 3D-styled mobile device mockup with floating animation, displaying a gradient screen with placeholder UI elements and app icon.
frontend/src/components/animations/Neura: Canvas-based animation rendering moving nodes with connecting lines and flowing data particles to simulate a neural network.
frontend/src/components/animations/Websi: Sequential animation showing website components (header, sidebar, content, footer) assembling into a complete layout with staggered transitions.
frontend/src/components/animations/Workf: Canvas-based workflow diagram animation showing connected nodes (Start, Process, Validate, Complete) with animated data flow particles moving along connections.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Displays contact information (name, phone, WhatsApp, Instagram, email) in animated glass cards with intersection observer for scroll animations and special highlight effects.
frontend/src/components/EagleClickAnimat: Full-screen eagle logo animation component with multi-stage sequence (fade, draw, expand, particles, pulse, scale, fadeout) triggered on click events.
frontend/src/components/EagleLogo.tsx: Circular eagle head logo component with layered neon glow effects, hover animations, and one-time entry animation tracked via sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/EliteClientProfi: Displays three client testimonial cards with profile images, positions, and quotes in a responsive grid with scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
Call-to-action section with email input form and submit button featuring gradient background, grid overlay, and ripple effect on interaction.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with brand info, multi-column link sections (Company, Services, Resources, Legal), social media icons, and copyright notice with Caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/FounderSection.t: Displays a glassmorphic founder profile card for Shaikh Zeeshan with animated background decorations, hover effects, and neon-styled text highlighting his role as Founder & CEO.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Main hero section with parallax effects, animated neural network background, eagle logo, floating particles, and CTA buttons that trigger eagle click animations before scrolling to target sections.
frontend/src/components/HowItWorksSectio: Three-step process section explaining system integration, AI agent deployment, and automation scaling with animated icons, connecting lines, and intersection observer-based fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/IntegrationsSect: Displays a horizontally scrolling marquee of 10+ integration logos (Slack, Google Workspace, etc.) with glassmorphic cards, animated gradient backgrounds, and staggered fade-in effects.
frontend/src/components/IntroAnimation.t: Full-screen intro animation component that displays the SwiftOps eagle logo with fade-in/out phases, pulse rings, and light sweep effects before calling onComplete callback.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed navigation bar with eagle logo, desktop/mobile menus, active section highlighting, scroll-based styling changes, and ripple effects that trigger eagle animations before scrolling to sections.
frontend/src/components/NeonCursor.tsx: Custom neon cursor effect that follows mouse movement on desktop devices (min-width 1024px) with a radial gradient glow and blur effect.
frontend/src/components/ServiceDetailPan: Modal panel component that displays detailed service information with animated visuals, description, features list, and a 'Get Started' button that scrolls to the contact section.
Services grid section that displays service cards with hover effects and opens the ServiceDetailPanel when clicked, using intersection observer for scroll animations.
frontend/src/components/StatsSection.tsx: Statistics display section showing four animated counters (tasks automated, integrations, uptime, clients) with fade-in animations triggered by scroll visibility.
frontend/src/data/servicesData.ts: Defines the ServiceData interface and exports an array of six service offerings (AI Agents, AI Chatbots, Email Automation, Workflow Automation, Website Development, App Development) with titles, descriptions, features, icons, and image paths.
frontend/src/hooks/useActiveSection.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track which section is currently visible in the viewport and returns the active section ID as a hash string.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor based on Internet Identity authentication state, automatically invalidating and refetching dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCounterAnimation.t: Custom hook that animates a number from 0 to a target value over a specified duration using requestAnimationFrame, triggered by a boolean flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Custom hook that returns a boolean indicating whether a referenced element is intersecting the viewport, with configurable threshold and rootMargin options.
frontend/src/hooks/useParallax.ts: Custom hook that tracks scroll position and returns an offset value multiplied by a speed factor for parallax scrolling effects.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for React Query hooks that would interact with the backend; currently exports nothing as no backend queries are needed.
frontend/src/hooks/useRippleEffect.ts: Custom hook that creates a Material Design-style ripple effect on button clicks by dynamically creating and animating a span element at the click position.
frontend/src/hooks/useSectionAnimation.t: Custom hook using IntersectionObserver to detect when sections enter the viewport and trigger fade-in/translateY animations with optional delay and configurable thresholds.
frontend/src/hooks/useServicePanel.ts: Custom hook managing the state of a service detail panel, providing functions to open/close the panel and track the currently active service.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for dark theme colors using OKLCH, Tailwind directives, neon/glassmorphism effects, animations, and utility classes for the futuristic UI design.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root React component wrapped with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/utils/scrollHelpers.ts: Utility functions for smooth scrolling to elements with offset compensation, triggering highlight effects via custom events, and combined scroll-to-section functionality.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom neon/electric blue color palette, Orbitron and Inter fonts, CSS variable-based theming for shadcn/ui components, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting an AI branding website with futuristic eagle logo animations, neon glow effects, smooth scroll navigation, and implemented features including energy spread effects and service button interactions.
